text: /brief Add invoice export for finance ops.
I can infer the user, system, and broad goal. The highest-impact missing detail is which first-release constraints matter most.

input.question: Which first-release constraints should I lock in before writing the brief?

options.label: Rate limiting

options.label: Admin-only access

text: Audit logging, admin-only access, and CSV only for the first release.

[Requirements]
Goal:           Add invoice export for finance operations.
Inputs:         Existing finance ops area and invoice data model in the repo.
Constraints:    Audit logging; admin-only access; CSV only for the first release.
Assumptions:    Export runs synchronously unless the codebase shows an existing job path we should reuse.
Open questions: None.

Brief written to `.pipeline/brief.md`. Run `/design` when ready.
